templates.name: approval-decision-panel
templates.description: Approval Decision Panel - reusable Yeeflow approval-form decision block with comments and validation.
templates.businessPurpose: Capture or display reviewer decision and comments in an approval context.
templates.runtimeProofStatus: Inventory-only. Needs focused approval-task runtime proof before relying on decision writeback.

inputParameters.name: Decision Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable approval form field or variable used to save the selected decision value.

inputParameters.name: Comment Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable approval form field or variable used to save approver comments or reason text.

inputParameters.name: Title Text
inputParameters.desc: Panel title shown above the decision controls.

inputParameters.name: Subtitle Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional helper text shown below the title.

inputParameters.name: Approve Label
inputParameters.desc: Button label for the approve decision. Default is Approve.

inputParameters.name: Reject Label
inputParameters.desc: Button label for the reject decision. Default is Reject.

inputParameters.name: Request Changes Label
inputParameters.desc: Button label for the request-changes decision. Default is Request Changes.

inputParameters.name: Default Decision
inputParameters.desc: Optional default decision code, such as approve, reject, or revise. Used only when no saved value exists.

inputParameters.name: Require Comment On Reject
inputParameters.desc: Whether Reject requires a comment before the decision value is saved. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Require Comment On Request Changes
inputParameters.desc: Whether Request Changes requires a comment before the decision value is saved. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Show Comment Box
inputParameters.desc: Whether the comment/reason text box is shown. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Comment Placeholder
inputParameters.desc: Placeholder text shown inside the comment box.

inputParameters.name: Panel Style
inputParameters.desc: Visual style: standard, compact, or bordered. Default is standard.

inputParameters.name: Show Status Summary
inputParameters.desc: Whether selected decision summary text is shown. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Readonly Text
inputParameters.desc: Text shown when the control is readonly and no decision has been saved.

inputParameters.name: Decision Options JSON
inputParameters.desc: Optional JSON array for custom decisions. Each item can include code, label, tone, helper, and requireComment.

inputParameters.name: Reject Validation Message
inputParameters.desc: Optional message shown when Reject requires a comment.

inputParameters.name: Request Changes Validation Message
inputParameters.desc: Optional message shown when Request Changes requires a comment.

templates.expectedDataSource: Approval form variables/fields for decision and comment values.
templates.expectedOutputWriteback: Writes decision and comment to configured form variables/fields.
runtimeRisks: Public form support is not proven and must not be claimed.
validationChecksNeeded: public form not claimed unless separately tested

templates.name: distribution-chart-module
templates.description: Distribution Chart Module - reusable Yeeflow dashboard custom code template for grouped category/count analytics.
templates.businessPurpose: Render grouped category/count analytics from a Yeeflow data list.
templates.runtimeProofStatus: Inventory-only. Needs dashboard runtime proof with real list records.

inputParameters.name: Data List ID
inputParameters.desc: Target Yeeflow data list ID used as the chart data source. Supports expression editor values.

inputParameters.name: Category Field
inputParameters.desc: Field ID/name used to group records, such as Status, Department, Region, Owner, or Category.

inputParameters.name: Title Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional module title shown above the chart.

inputParameters.name: Subtitle Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional helper text shown below the title.

inputParameters.name: Chart Type
inputParameters.desc: Chart mode: donut, pie, horizontalBar, bar, or verticalBar. Default is donut.

inputParameters.name: Max Categories
inputParameters.desc: Maximum number of category groups shown before remaining groups are combined as Other. Default is 8.

inputParameters.name: Show Legend
inputParameters.desc: Whether the legend/count list is shown. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Show Count
inputParameters.desc: Whether record counts are shown in chart labels and legend rows. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Empty Text
inputParameters.desc: Text shown when no records or no category values are available.

inputParameters.name: Color Mode
inputParameters.desc: Color palette: yeeflow, soft, status, or slate. Default is yeeflow.

inputParameters.name: Sort Mode
inputParameters.desc: Sort behavior: countDesc, countAsc, labelAsc, labelDesc, or source. Default is countDesc.

inputParameters.name: Filter Expression
inputParameters.desc: Optional Yeeflow query filter object/array/JSON from expression editor. Leave blank for all records.

inputParameters.name: Height
inputParameters.desc: Optional chart area height in pixels. Default is 280.

inputParameters.name: Page Size
inputParameters.desc: Maximum records queried for aggregation. Default is 500.

inputParameters.name: Unknown Label
inputParameters.desc: Label used when the category field is empty. Default is Unknown.

inputParameters.name: Other Label
inputParameters.desc: Label used when categories beyond Max Categories are combined. Default is Other.

templates.expectedDataSource: Data list queried and grouped by a category/status field.
runtimeRisks: Public form support is not proven and must not be claimed.
List query filter/payload shape must be runtime-tested with real Yeeflow records.
validationChecksNeeded: public form not claimed unless separately tested
source list exists and sample records cover non-empty display

templates.name: kpi-card-set
templates.description: KPI Card Set - reusable Yeeflow dashboard custom code template for displaying configurable KPI cards.
templates.businessPurpose: Display configurable KPI cards from static JSON or mapped data.
templates.runtimeProofStatus: Inventory-only. Render proof needed for each context; dashboard is the primary target.

inputParameters.name: Cards Config
inputParameters.desc: Expression-editor value containing KPI card configuration. Supports JSON array, object with cards/items/data, variable, temp variable, or expression result.

inputParameters.name: Title Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional title shown above the KPI card set.

inputParameters.name: Subtitle Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional supporting text shown below the title.

inputParameters.name: Layout Mode
inputParameters.desc: Card layout: auto, one, two, three, or four. Default is auto.

inputParameters.name: Default Card Tone
inputParameters.desc: Default tone for cards without their own tone: blue, green, amber, red, violet, or slate.

inputParameters.name: Title Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as each KPI card title. Example: MetricName.

inputParameters.name: Value Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as each KPI card value. Example: MetricValue.

inputParameters.name: Subtitle Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as each KPI card subtitle/helper text.

inputParameters.name: Trend Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as each KPI card trend/change text.

inputParameters.name: Trend Direction Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as trend direction: up, down, or neutral.

inputParameters.name: Tone Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as card tone: blue, green, amber, red, violet, or slate.

inputParameters.name: Format Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as value format: auto, number, percent, or text.

inputParameters.name: Prefix Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as text before the KPI value.

inputParameters.name: Suffix Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as text after the KPI value.

inputParameters.name: Icon Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as the small card marker/icon text.

inputParameters.name: Target Label Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as the target label.

inputParameters.name: Target Value Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as the target value.

inputParameters.name: Decimals Field
inputParameters.desc: Optional source data field used as card-specific decimal places.

inputParameters.name: Show Trend
inputParameters.desc: Whether trend/change text should be shown. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Show Icon
inputParameters.desc: Whether card icons/initial markers should be shown. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Compact Mode
inputParameters.desc: Whether compact spacing is enabled. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Empty State Text
inputParameters.desc: Text shown when no KPI card configuration is available.

inputParameters.name: Number Locale
inputParameters.desc: Locale used for number formatting, such as en-US. Leave blank for browser default.

inputParameters.name: Decimal Places
inputParameters.desc: Default decimal places for numeric KPI values. Default is 0.

inputParameters.name: Minimum Card Width
inputParameters.desc: Minimum card width in pixels when layoutMode is auto. Default is 220.

inputParameters.name: Value Size
inputParameters.desc: Value text size: small, medium, or large. Default is medium.

templates.expectedDataSource: Static JSON cardsConfig or data object/array supplied through expression parameters.
runtimeRisks: Public form support is not proven and must not be claimed.
validationChecksNeeded: public form not claimed unless separately tested

templates.name: smart-lookup-picker
templates.description: Smart Lookup Picker - reusable Yeeflow lookup/search-select control for approval forms and data list forms.
templates.businessPurpose: Search, select, and optionally manually add lookup records from a target list.
templates.runtimeProofStatus: Export-backed and runtime-proven for dashboard, approval form, and data-list custom form. Public form is not tested.

inputParameters.name: Data List ID
inputParameters.desc: Target Yeeflow data list ID used for lookup query.

inputParameters.name: Display Field
inputParameters.desc: Field ID/name used for display text and keyword search matching.

inputParameters.name: Value Field
inputParameters.desc: Field ID/name used as the saved value for selected matched items.

inputParameters.name: Save To Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save the full combined JSON result. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: Selected Items Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save matched selected values only. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: New Items Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save manual/free-text items only. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: Multi Select
inputParameters.desc: Whether multi-select is enabled. Use true or false.

inputParameters.name: Allow Manual Entry
inputParameters.desc: Whether manual/free-text entry is enabled. Use true or false.

inputParameters.name: Max Results
inputParameters.desc: Maximum number of matched records shown in the suggestion list.

inputParameters.name: Placeholder Text
inputParameters.desc: Placeholder text shown in the lookup input.

inputParameters.name: Label Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional label/title shown above the control.

inputParameters.name: No Result Text
inputParameters.desc: Text shown when no matched records are found.

inputParameters.name: Manual Tag Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional label shown on manual item chips.

inputParameters.name: Minimum Search Characters
inputParameters.desc: Optional minimum characters before querying. Default is 1.

inputParameters.name: Search Debounce Milliseconds
inputParameters.desc: Optional search debounce delay. Default is 260.

templates.name: trend-chart-module
templates.description: Trend Chart Module - reusable Yeeflow dashboard custom code template for time-based list trends.
templates.businessPurpose: Render time-based list trends by day, week, or month.
templates.runtimeProofStatus: Inventory-only. Needs dashboard runtime proof with dated records.

inputParameters.name: Data List ID
inputParameters.desc: Target Yeeflow data list ID used as the trend data source. Supports expression editor values.

inputParameters.name: Date Field
inputParameters.desc: Field ID/name used as the time axis, such as CreatedTime, SubmitDate, CompletedDate, or AttendanceDate.

inputParameters.name: Title Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional module title shown above the chart.

inputParameters.name: Subtitle Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional supporting text shown below the title.

inputParameters.name: Chart Type
inputParameters.desc: Chart mode: line, area, areaLine, column, or bar. Default is line.

inputParameters.name: Time Granularity
inputParameters.desc: Time bucket grouping: day, week, or month. Default is day.

inputParameters.name: Max Points
inputParameters.desc: Maximum number of time buckets shown. Default is 12.

inputParameters.name: Show Point Labels
inputParameters.desc: Whether value labels are shown on points or columns. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Show X Axis Labels
inputParameters.desc: Whether date bucket labels are shown on the x-axis. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Show Y Axis
inputParameters.desc: Whether a simple y-axis and grid are shown. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Empty Text
inputParameters.desc: Text shown when no valid dated records are available.

inputParameters.name: Color Mode
inputParameters.desc: Color palette: yeeflow, green, amber, red, violet, or slate. Default is yeeflow.

inputParameters.name: Sort Mode
inputParameters.desc: Time order: chronological or reverseChronological. Default is chronological.

inputParameters.name: Filter Expression
inputParameters.desc: Optional Yeeflow query filter object/array/JSON from expression editor. Leave blank for all records.

inputParameters.name: Height
inputParameters.desc: Optional chart area height in pixels. Default is 280.

inputParameters.name: Page Size
inputParameters.desc: Maximum records queried for aggregation. Default is 500.

inputParameters.name: Date Range Mode
inputParameters.desc: Optional local date range: all, last7Days, last30Days, last90Days, thisMonth, or last12Months. Default is all.

inputParameters.name: Cumulative Mode
inputParameters.desc: Whether the chart shows running total values instead of per-bucket counts. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Fill Missing Buckets
inputParameters.desc: Whether missing day/week/month buckets should be shown as zero. Supports true/false or dynamic expression.

inputParameters.name: Unknown Date Label
inputParameters.desc: Internal label used for invalid dates in diagnostics. Invalid dates are excluded from the chart.

templates.expectedDataSource: Data list queried and bucketed by a date/datetime field.
runtimeRisks: Public form support is not proven and must not be claimed.
List query filter/payload shape must be runtime-tested with real Yeeflow records.
validationChecksNeeded: public form not claimed unless separately tested
source list exists and sample records cover non-empty display
